case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. OMAR GONZALO GUAL TREJO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,900.97 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TREJO, OMAR GONZALO GUAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-31-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT OMAR GONZALO GUAL TREJO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.
